headline: PG&E Corporation (PCG) Reports Strong Q1 Results, Reaffirms Full-Year Guidance
summary: PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG) is included among the 10 Best Electrical Infrastructure Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds.
